=== AIVA GOVERNED RUNTIME KB UPDATE ===

STATUS: CLOSED LOOP — TRUTH ENFORCEMENT ACTIVE

LAYER: ELIGIBILITY + MUTATION + PERSISTENCE + EXECUTION (TOUR)

---

WHAT EXISTS:

1. Eligibility Gate (Shared-Core)
   - Blocks invalid activation
   - Enforces proof before consequence

2. Enforcement Wrapper
   - Throws on BLOCKED
   - Holds on DRIFT

3. Mutation Protection
   - Replay attack detection
   - Post-review mutation blocked
   - Cross-artifact drift blocked

4. Truth Ledger (Dual)
   - Append-only
   - Hash chained
   - Mirror verified
   - Divergence detection active

5. FundTrackerAI Binding
   - Activation cannot occur without eligibility

6. LawAidAI Binding
   - Writes blocked if eligibility invalid

7. TOUR Gate (Execution-Time Revalidation)
   - Truth must be re-proven at execution
   - Stale verification blocked
   - Dependency drift blocked

---

WHAT IS NOW IMPOSSIBLE:

- Activation without eligibility
- Replay mutation
- Post-review override
- Cross-artifact inconsistency
- Silent ledger tampering

---

WHAT IS NOW GUARANTEED:

- Truth must exist before consequence
- Truth must persist across mutation
- Truth must be recorded immutably
- Truth must be re-proven at execution

---

SYSTEM LAW:

"No consequence occurs unless truth is proven, preserved, and revalidated at execution."

---

STATUS:

HIL LAYER ACTIVE
TRUTH ENFORCEMENT: NON-BYPASSABLE
KB LOOP: CLOSED
